item.title: Welcome
item.description: I’m Shashank Rao welcome to my digital garden 🌱 About Me I’m a Year 3 Undergraduate molecular genetics student at King’s College London, presently working as a Computational Biology Placement Student at GSK.

item.title: About Tools
item.description: These are a collection of tools I’ve written to make my life easier. Feel free to utilise them yourself, though note that you do so at your own risk.

item.title: Tsuki
item.description: Download Coming Soon Have you ever written something important on a piece of paper, only to never see it again? Or perhaps you can’t keep track of which of your cold-emails have been responded to, and if they need a follow-up.

item.title: LinkedIn Rewind 2025 Post Links
item.description: 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗷𝗲𝗰𝘁𝘀: InternshipWizard (github.com/ShashankRaoCoding/NotionIntegrated) Blog on the BSRA Internship (www.shanksmakesstuff.xyz/Blog/Using-Genomics-to-Explore-if-Hot-Flushes-Cause-Insomnia) Tsuki (www.shanksmakesstuff.xyz/Blog/Tsuki) Chirp (github.com/ShashankRaoCoding/Chirp) Think Pythonic...

item.title: Using Genomics to Explore if Hot Flushes Cause Insomnia
item.description: .page-title { font-size: 1.70rem; text-wrap: nowrap; max-inline-size: 25vw; overflow: hidden; } .explorer-content { max-width: 50%; } .
